changes: Preserved the Hunyuan-generated face, body silhouette, hair, outfit texture, and overall visual likeness.
Kept the polish pass non-additive after the first additive detail attempt produced distracting floating gems.
Removed helper geometry from the exported scene and kept runtime bounds centered on the character mesh.
Smoothed body mesh polygons and kept a weighted-normal source pass for softer anime-style shading.
Tuned material roughness/specular response without replacing the original texture.

runtimeDecision.reason: This pass keeps the more vivid Hunyuan likeness while making the cleaned BlenderMCP source the current runtime preview.

limitations: Still a single Hunyuan mesh, so face, hair, outfit, hands, and shoes are not separately editable.
Skin weights remain auto-generated preview weights.
This is a visual-preserving runtime preview, not the final commercial-grade retopologized character.
